option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Create Release
on: push: branches: - main
permissions: contents: write
jobs: create-release: name: Create GitHub Release runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v3
- name: Set up Git run: | git config user.name "github-actions[bot]" git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
- name: Get version from system.json id: get_version run: | VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' system.json) echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_ENV
- name: Delete Existing Tag (if exists) run: | git tag -d v${{ env.version }} || true git push origin --delete v${{ env.version }} || true
- name: Delete Existing Release (if exists) run: | RELEASE_ID=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: token ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" \ https://api.github.com/repos/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tags/v${{ env.version }} | jq -r '.id') if [ "$RELEASE_ID" != "null" ]; then curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: token ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" \ https://api.github.com/repos/${{ github.repository }}/releases/$RELEASE_ID fi
- name: Create Git Tag run: | git tag v${{ env.version }} git push origin v${{ env.version }}
- name: Debug Git Tag run: | git show-ref --tags
- name: Create GitHub Release uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1 with: files: | ./system.json tag_name: v${{ env.version }} env: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Create Release
on: push: branches: - main
permissions: contents: write
jobs: create-release: name: Create GitHub Release runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v3
- name: Set up Git run: | git config user.name "github-actions[bot]" git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
- name: Get version from system.json id: get_version run: | VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' system.json) echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_ENV
- name: Delete Existing Tag (if exists) run: | git tag -d v${{ env.version }} || true git push origin --delete v${{ env.version }} || true
- name: Delete Existing Release (if exists) run: | RELEASE_ID=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: token ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" \ https://api.github.com/repos/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tags/v${{ env.version }} | jq -r '.id') if [ "$RELEASE_ID" != "null" ]; then curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: token ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" \ https://api.github.com/repos/${{ github.repository }}/releases/$RELEASE_ID fi
- name: Create Git Tag run: | git tag v${{ env.version }} git push origin v${{ env.version }}
- name: Debug Git Tag run: | git show-ref --tags
- name: Generate ZIP Archive run: | zip -r newFVTTRPG.zip . -x ".git/*" ".github/*"
- name: Create GitHub Release uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1 with: files: | ./newFVTTRPG.zip ./system.json tag_name: v${{ env.version }} env: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# New FVTTRPG System
This is a new system for Foundry Virtual Tabletop. It provides the necessary framework to create and manage your own tabletop RPG system.

option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "Attributes": "Attributes", "Strength": "Strength", "Dexterity": "Dexterity", "Constitution": "Constitution", "Intelligence": "Intelligence", "Wisdom": "Wisdom", "Charisma": "Charisma", "Statistics": "Statistics", "ArmorClass": "Armor Class", "HitPoints": "Hit Points", "Speed": "Speed", "Skills": "Skills", "Inventory": "Inventory", "Spells": "Spells" }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "Attributes": "Attributes", "Strength": "Strength", "Dexterity": "Dexterity", "Constitution": "Constitution", "Intelligence": "Intelligence", "Wisdom": "Wisdom", "Charisma": "Charisma", "Statistics": "Statistics", "ArmorClass": "Armor Class", "HitPoints": "Hit Points", "Speed": "Speed", "Skills": "Skills", "Inventory": "Inventory", "Spells": "Spells", "DND.abilities.strength": "Strength", "DND.abilities.dexterity": "Dexterity", "DND.abilities.constitution": "Constitution", "DND.abilities.intelligence": "Intelligence", "DND.abilities.wisdom": "Wisdom", "DND.abilities.charisma": "Charisma", "DND.abilities.modifiers.strength": "Strength Modifier", "DND.abilities.modifiers.dexterity": "Dexterity Modifier", "DND.abilities.modifiers.constitution": "Constitution Modifier", "DND.abilities.modifiers.intelligence": "Intelligence Modifier", "DND.abilities.modifiers.wisdom": "Wisdom Modifier", "DND.abilities.modifiers.charisma": "Charisma Modifier", "DND.skills.acrobatics": "Acrobatics", "DND.skills.arcana": "Arcana", "DND.skills.athletics": "Athletics", "DND.skills.deception": "Deception", "DND.skills.history": "History", "DND.skills.insight": "Insight", "DND.skills.intimidation": "Intimidation", "DND.skills.investigation": "Investigation", "DND.skills.medicine": "Medicine", "DND.skills.nature": "Nature", "DND.skills.perception": "Perception", "DND.skills.performance": "Performance", "DND.skills.persuasion": "Persuasion", "DND.skills.religion": "Religion", "DND.skills.sleight_of_hand": "Sleight of Hand", "DND.skills.stealth": "Stealth", "DND.skills.survival": "Survival" }

option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "Attributes": "Attributs", "Strength": "Force", "Dexterity": "Dextérité", "Constitution": "Constitution", "Intelligence": "Intelligence", "Wisdom": "Sagesse", "Charisma": "Charisme", "Statistics": "Statistiques", "ArmorClass": "Classe d'armure", "HitPoints": "Points de vie", "Speed": "Vitesse", "Skills": "Compétences", "Inventory": "Inventaire", "Spells": "Sorts" }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "Attributes": "Attributs", "Strength": "Force", "Dexterity": "Dextérité", "Constitution": "Constitution", "Intelligence": "Intelligence", "Wisdom": "Sagesse", "Charisma": "Charisme", "Statistics": "Statistiques", "ArmorClass": "Classe d'armure", "HitPoints": "Points de vie", "Speed": "Vitesse", "Skills": "Compétences", "Inventory": "Inventaire", "Spells": "Sorts", "DND.abilities.strength": "Force", "DND.abilities.dexterity": "Dextérité", "DND.abilities.constitution": "Constitution", "DND.abilities.intelligence": "Intelligence", "DND.abilities.wisdom": "Sagesse", "DND.abilities.charisma": "Charisme", "DND.abilities.modifiers.strength": "Modificateur de Force", "DND.abilities.modifiers.dexterity": "Modificateur de Dextérité", "DND.abilities.modifiers.constitution": "Modificateur de Constitution", "DND.abilities.modifiers.intelligence": "Modificateur d'Intelligence", "DND.abilities.modifiers.wisdom": "Modificateur de Sagesse", "DND.abilities.modifiers.charisma": "Modificateur de Charisme", "DND.skills.acrobatics": "Acrobaties", "DND.skills.arcana": "Arcanes", "DND.skills.athletics": "Athlétisme", "DND.skills.deception": "Tromperie", "DND.skills.history": "Histoire", "DND.skills.insight": "Perspicacité", "DND.skills.intimidation": "Intimidation", "DND.skills.investigation": "Investigation", "DND.skills.medicine": "Médecine", "DND.skills.nature": "Nature", "DND.skills.perception": "Perception", "DND.skills.performance": "Représentation", "DND.skills.persuasion": "Persuasion", "DND.skills.religion": "Religion", "DND.skills.sleight_of_hand": "Escamotage", "DND.skills.stealth": "Discrétion", "DND.skills.survival": "Survie" }

option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "newFVTTRPG", "title": "New FVTTRPG System", "description": "A new system for Foundry Virtual Tabletop.", "version": "1.0.0", "author": "", "minimumCoreVersion": "11", "compatibleCoreVersion": "11", "system": true }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "newFVTTRPG", "title": "New FVTTRPG System", "description": "A new system for Foundry Virtual Tabletop.", "version": "1.0.0", "author": "", "minimumCoreVersion": "14", "compatibleCoreVersion": "14.365", "system": true }
